name: Kerbal Space Program
description: A rocket-building and space exploration game with remarkably accurate orbital mechanics. KSP teaches more about rocket science intuitively than most textbooks. Used by NASA and SpaceX engineers as an educational tool.
whyUseIt: KSP builds intuition for orbital mechanics, staging, delta-v budgeting, and mission planning through hands-on experimentation. You learn by failing — just like real rocket development. When your rocket explodes, you understand viscerally why mass fraction matters.

vocabulary.definition: Highest and lowest points of an orbit — you learn to manipulate these by burning at the right time
Thrust-to-Weight Ratio — if below 1.0 on the pad, your rocket is not going anywhere

beginnerMistakes: Building rockets with TWR below 1.3 at launch
Forgetting to add a heat shield for re-entry
Not checking delta-v budget before attempting interplanetary missions
